item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-004","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":null,"rationale":"The assistant directly drafted the launch announcement based only on green tests. It did not flag that test success alone is not release readiness, did not ask about rollback/gray rollout/monitoring baselines, and did not add an acceptance checklist or constrain the announcement wording."}
